raw.message: For trusted, in-depth analysis and live news as it happens, subscribe to The Times and Sunday Times today.

hook.summary: A woman gazes at a painting in a gallery as a subscription offer appears.
hook.visual_action: Close-up profile of a woman looking up at a framed artwork in a gallery setting.
hook.text_overlay: THE TIMES THE SUNDAY TIMES FLASH SALE £1 for 3 months

scene_flow: A woman is shown in profile looking up at a painting in a gallery with the newspaper logo.
The text 'FLASH SALE £1' appears in the center of the frame.
The text 'for 3 months' is added below the price.
The scene holds on the complete offer as the camera slowly zooms.
audience_proxy: Intellectually curious adults and professionals seeking high-quality news coverage.
